Package space.sunqian.fs.data

Interface DataMap

All Superinterfaces:
Map<String,Object>
public interface DataMap extends Map<String,Object>
This interface extends the Map interface with signature Map<String, Object>, provides methods to get and convert values to common types, such as getString(String), getInt(String), etc. The original methods of Map are also supported and without any conversion.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface java.util.Map

    Map.Entry<K extends Object,V extends Object>

    boolean
    contentEquals(@Nullable Map<@Nonnull String,?> o)
    Returns true if the content of this DataMap are equal to the content of the given map, false otherwise.

    Returns true if the given object is an instance of DataMap and their contents are equal, false otherwise.

    Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the String type.
    static @Nonnull DataMap
    newMap()
    Returns a new DataMap based on the LinkedHashMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.

    toObject(@Nonnull Class<T> cls)
    Converts this DataMap to a new object of the specified class.

    Converts this DataMap to a new object of the specified class.
    static @Nonnull DataMap
    wrap(@Nonnull Map<String,Object> map)
    Wraps the given Map to a DataMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.

    wrap(@Nonnull Map<String,Object> map, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
    Wraps the given Map to a DataMap with the given ObjectConverter and default options.

    Methods inherited from interface java.util.Map

    clear, compute, computeIfAbsent, computeIfPresent, containsKey, containsValue, entrySet, forEach, get, getOrDefault, hashCode, isEmpty, keySet, merge, put, putAll, putIfAbsent, remove, remove, replace, replace, replaceAll, size, values

  • Method Details

    • newMap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataMap newMap()
      Returns a new DataMap based on the LinkedHashMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataMap

    • wrap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataMap wrap(@Nonnull @Nonnull Map<String,Object> map)
      Wraps the given Map to a DataMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.
      Parameters:
      map - the Map to wrap
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataMap

    • wrap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataMap wrap(@Nonnull @Nonnull Map<String,Object> map, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
      Wraps the given Map to a DataMap with the given ObjectConverter and default options.
      Parameters:
      map - the Map to wrap
      converter - the ObjectConverter to use for conversion values
      defaultOptions - the default options to use for conversion
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataMap

    • get

      default <T> T get(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key, T defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the type of the default value. If the key is not found, returns defaultValue.

      Note that this method uses Object.getClass() to get the type of the default value, if the default value is null, the type to convert the value to will be Object.

      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted value of the specified key, or defaultValue if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException

    • get

      <T> T get(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type type, T defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the specified type. If the key is not found, returns defaultValue.

      Note the specified type must be the type of the default value.

      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      type - the type to convert the value to
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted value of the specified key, or defaultValue if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException

    • getString

      @Nullable default @Nullable String getString(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the String type. If the key is not found, returns null.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      Returns:
      the converted string value of the specified key, or null if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getString

      default String getString(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key, String defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the String type. If the key is not found, returns defaultValue.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted string value of the specified key, or defaultValue if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getInt

      default int getInt(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the int type. If the key is not found, returns 0.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      Returns:
      the converted int value of the specified key, or 0 if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getInt

      default int getInt(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key, int defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the int type. If the key is not found, returns defaultValue.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted int value of the specified key, or defaultValue if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      default long getLong(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the long type. If the key is not found, returns 0.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      Returns:
      the converted long value of the specified key, or 0 if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getFloat

      default float getFloat(@Nonnull @Nonnull String key) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified key, then converts it to the float type. If the key is not found, returns 0.0f.
      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      Returns:
      the converted float value of the specified key, or 0.0f if the key is not found
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      Parameters:
      key - the specified key
      Returns:
      the converted double value of the specified key, or 0.0 if the key is not found

      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • contentEquals

      boolean contentEquals(@Nullable @Nullable Map<@Nonnull String,?> o)
      Returns true if the content of this DataMap are equal to the content of the given map, false otherwise.

      Returns:
